title: Ability to sort Gantt view on not grouped column
excerpt:
Hi all, 
on Gantt diagramm there is not the ability to sort displayed items on value of a column.

posts.author: vielmont (Jean-Luc Vielmont)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

on Gantt diagramm there is not the ability to sort displayed items on value of a column.
There is the ability to group items on a column value but not to sort them
It could be interesting to sort on a column not used to group items.

Regards
